name: molmo-cleanup
summary: Drive the legacy/current MolmoSpaces cleanup MCP bridge.

mcp.boundary_notes: This bridge intentionally exposes global scene_objects for current-contract proof loops. It is not the ADR-0003 real-world profile.

refactor_signals: new cleanup work should prefer molmo-realworld-cleanup
global scene_objects should not leak into real-world cleanup skills
promote_to_mcp_when: do not promote legacy shortcuts; replace them with profile-safe public tools
